ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant
Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Lait entier (76%), sucre, amidon modifié, chocolat (2,1%) (sucre, beurre de cacao, cacao sec dégraissé), cacaos maigres, sirop de glucose, gélifiant : carraghénanes, arôme, sel.
